inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the excavation or fill area (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the excavation or fill area (meters)

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the excavation or fill area (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the excavation or fill area (meters)

inputs.label: Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of soil to be moved (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of soil to be moved (meters)

inputs.label: Soil Density
inputs.businessContext: Average bulk density of the soil (tonnes per cubic meter, typically 1.2-2.0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average bulk density of the soil (tonnes per cubic meter, typically 1.2-2.0)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprağın ortalama yığın yoğunluğu (ton/metreküp, tipik olarak 1.2-2.0)

inputs.label: Swell / Compaction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor accounting for soil swell after excavation or compaction requirement (1.0 = no change, >1 for extra volume needed)

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor accounting for soil swell after excavation or compaction requirement (1.0 = no change, >1 for extra volume needed)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazı sonrası toprak kabarması veya sıkıştırma gereksinimini hesaba katan faktör (1.0 = değişiklik yok, >1 ek hacim gerektiğinde)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
